title: ILY 3D Sticker Maker Refill Pack – Safari Party | DIY Arts & Crafts Kit for Kids Ages 6+ | Creative Toy Gift Set with 50+ Custom Refills for Boys & Girls
features: 3D Sticker Maker Kit Safari Party Pack: Unleash creativity with our fun DIY arts and crafts set for boys and girls aged 6+. Includes over 50 custom refills to create vibrant 3D stickers, perfect for parties and playdates.

Complete Refill Pack: This set contains 50 sticker blisters, backgrounds, and blister trays, plus sprinkles and glitter mix-ins. Requires a 3D Sticker Maker (sold separately) for creating dazzling, undersea-themed sticker shakers.
Fun for All Ages: Designed for kids 6 and up, but adults love it too! Perfect for creative play, this kit offers endless hours of entertainment and makes an excellent gift for budding artists.
Easy to Use: Comes with easy-to-follow instructions, making it simple for kids to create their own 3D stickers. Encourage artistic expression and fine motor skills in a fun and engaging way.

Perfect for Parties and Gifts: The Safari Party Pack is ideal for birthday parties, craft activities, and gifts. Kids will enjoy making and sharing their unique 3D sticker creations with friends and family.
description: A New Dimension in fun with more 3-D stickers! Makes 50 Safari Party 3-D Sticker Shakers! (3-D Sticker Maker required, sold separately; these are the refill packs. Great for ages 6 and up! Adults love it too! ▪ 50x Sticker Blisters ▪ 50x Sticker Backgrounds ▪ 50x Blister Trays ▪ Sprinkles Mix-Ins ▪ Glitter Packet Mix-In ▪ Easy to Follow Instructions
